en: Always, always think your own thoughts, and act on them.
ko: 항상, 항상 자기 생각을 하고 그에 따라 행동해.

en: And act on them, and act on them.
ko: 그에 따라 행동해, 그에 따라 행동해.

en: I got no crew, I got no cash. Never been worse.
ko: 팀도 없고 돈도 없어. 이렇게 최악인 적은 없었어.

en: Let me ask around.
Let me ask around. Let me ask around.
Let me ask around. Jim, could you give us a hand?
ko: 좀 알아볼게. 짐, 좀 도와줄 수 있어?

en: Absolutely, yeah. Call it off, Pam. Call it off, okay?
Call it off. Call it off.
Call it off, Pam. Call it off, okay? What do I do?
ko: 취소해, 팸. 취소해, 알았지? 나는 어떻게 해?

en: Don't panic. We went through this. Just, just think. Give up?
ko: 당황하지 마. 이거 연습했잖아. 그냥, 생각해. 포기할까?

en: Give up, admit defeat.
Give up? Give up?
Think. Give up? Give up. Give up!
Hey, hey, hey, calm down, calm down, calm down.
ko: 야, 야, 야, 진정해, 진정해, 진정해.

en: Just calm down. Calm down, calm down.
Just calm down. Calm down, calm down.
Calm down, calm down, calm down. Captain, please.
Keep up.
Keep up. Keep up.
Keep up.
Keep up.
